title: [PatPat] Explosion Animation
description: Just a resource pack to replace default hand from PatPat Mod with explosion!
body:
Simple resource pack which replaces default hand animation from [PatPat Mod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat) with explosion animation. Also with sound!

Just download it, load in game, and enjoy!

![Banner [GIF]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tVqag7eT/images/6f6afc51fe7d63d83146ad34d8f1258aba8b5ac8.gif)
